cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Drive weekday morning pickup orders for a neighborhood bakery using commute relevance, breakfast guidance, and fast self-pickup clarity
input.offer_info: breakfast breads, sandwiches, coffee pair suggestions, quick pickup flow, no fake always-hot guarantee
input.audience_segment: office commuters and parents grabbing breakfast on the way to work or school

mustInclude: scene-based opening around rushed breakfast, school drop-off, or heading into the office
clear guidance between portable breads, more filling breakfast options, and sweet-versus-savory preferences
CTA that collects arrival time, pickup mode, and whether the order is for one person or for several
mustAvoid: guaranteed just-out-of-the-oven language at any hour

cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote celebration cake orders for a bakery using occasion matching, size guidance, and a consultative preorder CTA
input.offer_info: birthday and small celebration cakes, writing and candle options, size recommendations, pickup scheduling, no instant custom guarantee
input.audience_segment: families and couples planning birthdays, anniversaries, or small in-home celebrations

mustInclude: opening tied to celebration pressure or wanting a cake that arrives looking appropriate
specific guidance around cake size, sweetness, style direction, or inscription options
CTA collecting date, headcount, flavor direction, and whether pickup or delivery is needed

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Write copy for a new bakery with limited proof assets, a broad display case, and no fully confirmed hero product
input.offer_info: new store, breads and desserts across several categories, limited public proof, no verified top seller yet
input.audience_segment: local first-time customers comparing several nearby bakeries before trying one

mustInclude: conservative wording around popularity or signature certainty
implicit request for missing product proof, bestselling hierarchy, or clearer recommendation routes
copy that leans on approachable menu explanation and real freshness or process cues instead of hype
mustAvoid: claiming a hero item without evidence

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Promote holiday gift boxes and office pastry orders when stock rhythm, packaging combinations, and delivery boundaries are still being finalized
input.offer_info: giftable cookies and pastry boxes, possible customization, uncertain peak-day stock, delivery and pickup options with conditions
input.audience_segment: office admins and local shoppers arranging visit gifts or multi-person sharing orders

mustInclude: scenario-based wording instead of one exact always-available offer
clear mention of packaging, stock, or delivery boundary uncertainty
CTA that collects quantity, date, pickup-versus-delivery path, and gifting-versus-self-use intent before confirming options
mustAvoid: guaranteed on-time arrival at peak holiday periods

cases.label: failure_case

input.strategy_route: Push immediate conversion for a bakery by promising zero guilt, not fattening desserts, diabetic-friendly cakes, and meal-replacement health benefits
input.offer_info: sweet bakery products under pressure to grow orders fast, high compliance risk around wellness and body-related messaging
input.audience_segment: cold local traffic looking for a quick dessert or bread decision

mustInclude: explicit identification of risky health and body-related expressions in risk_phrases
conservative rewrite focused on sweetness level, portion choice, and occasion fit instead of pseudo-health claims
trust built through real product and service information rather than wellness promises
mustAvoid: diabetic-safe or therapeutic claims without evidence

cases.label: failure_case

input.strategy_route: Grow bakery orders fast by claiming top-ranked taste, the city's lowest price, one-hour custom cakes, and guaranteed delivery without deformation
input.offer_info: high-demand bakery offer with celebration cakes and daily breads, peak-hour fulfillment pressure, multiple logistical constraints
input.audience_segment: mixed cold traffic comparing nearby bakeries, dessert shops, and cafe bakeries

mustInclude: explicit marking of risky ranking, pricing, customization, and fulfillment phrases in risk_phrases
reframed urgency into preorder guidance, pickup-window planning, or expectation setting
CTA oriented to collecting date, quantity, customization depth, and delivery versus pickup before confirming suitability
mustAvoid: number-one or top-ranked claims without evidence
